title: Wano / Onigashima War — Chapter 1049
main_description: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge. This chapter contains 4 structured story parts and 110 cleaned dialogue lines.
